programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: (G) Jess Lydka-Morris explores Sydney in the new IM electric vehicle, highlighting cutting-edge innovation, premium design, and the future of intelligent driving.
